'''âh-j-g-t''' ('''kahajgetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrospray|electrospray]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-j-g-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrospray|electrospray]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-j-g-t
|-
! Lemma
| kahajgetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihajgetoko|thihajgetoko]] || [[word:jihajgetoko|jihajgetoko]] || [[word:shihajgetoko|shihajgetoko]] || [[word:kihajgetoko|kihajgetoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahajgetoko|thahajgetoko]] || [[word:jahajgetoko|jahajgetoko]] || [[word:shahajgetoko|shahajgetoko]] || [[word:kahajgetoko|kahajgetoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
